math.description: Full math library — trig, hyperbolic, logarithms, statistics, combinatorics, constants

string.description: String manipulation utilities (capitalize, slug, pad, truncate, etc.)

collections.description: Data structures — LinkedList, PriorityQueue, Deque, OrderedMap, Set, Stack, Queue

functional.description: Functional programming tools (map_list, filter_list, reduce_list, compose, pipe, etc.)

datetime.description: Date/time — parsing, formatting, timezones, epoch conversion, ranges

crypto.description: Cryptography — hashing, HMAC, AES encryption, PBKDF2, secure random, UUID

http.description: HTTP client helpers (http_fetch, http_send, parse_json, encode_url, etc.)

io.description: File I/O — read/write text & binary, walk directories, glob patterns, metadata

testing.description: Test framework — assertions, BDD grouping, hooks, benchmarks, skip/timeout

net.description: Networking — TCP/UDP sockets, HTTP client/server, WebSocket, DNS

json.description: JSON — parse, stringify, pretty-print, validation, merge, dot-path queries

sql.description: SQLite driver — CRUD, transactions, schema info, backup, parameterized queries

os.description: OS operations — env vars, processes, system info, signals

regex.description: Regular expressions — match, find, replace, split, compile, groups

encoding.description: Encoding — Base64, Base32, URL, HTML entities, hex, binary

auth.description: Auth & JWT — password hashing, JWT tokens, API keys, Bearer/Basic auth

websocket.description: WebSocket server — create, start/stop, rooms, broadcast, event handlers

template.description: Template engine — variables, loops, conditionals, filters, includes, inheritance

html.description: HTML builder — elements, tables, forms, lists, links, images, full pages, escaping

api.description: API helpers — pagination, validation, standard responses, versioning, Link headers

web.description: Web framework — Flask-powered routing, middleware, sessions, cookies, test client, uploads
